title: Past Events & Tech Challenges
text:
Multiple Uncrewed Aerial Systems
Deadline— August 5, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC seeks to establish a framework that utilizes current commercial technologies that can execute missions using multiple uncrewed aerial systems (UAS).
Read MoreMultiple Uncrewed Aerial Systems
Rapid Airfield Damage Recovery
Deadline— August 7, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC seeks to understand the range of commercially available ground anchoring systems and grout products for rapid airfield damage recovery.
Read MoreRapid Airfield Damage Recovery
Webinar: Protective Structure and System Technologies
Deadline— June 14, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC's patented protective structures and systems have strong market potential. During this webinar, attendees will learn how commercialization of these technologies can be beneficial for business growth and development.
Read MoreWebinar: Protective Structure and System Technologies
Large-Scale Hydraulic Structures Prototype Model Proof of Concept and Design
Deadline— June 12, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC invites solutions for the proof of concept and design of a large-scale hydraulic structures prototype model in a controlled environment.
Read MoreLarge-Scale Hydraulic Structures Prototype Model Proof of Concept and Design
Webinar: Opportunities to Collaborate with the U.S. Army ERDC
Deadline— June 10, 2024 (Closed)
The ERDC International Research Office invites international representatives from industry and academia to attend an informational webinar on June 12 to discover how to pursue innovation and collaboration opportunities with ERDC.
Read MoreWebinar: Opportunities to Collaborate with the U.S. Army ERDC
Computational Fluid Dynamics Methods for Water Resource Development
Deadline— May 17, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC invites proposals for the development of Computational Fluid Dynamics (CFD) methods and methodology tailored for application in U.S. Army Corps of Engineers projects.
Read MoreComputational Fluid Dynamics Methods for Water Resource Development
Autonomous Solutions for Bridge Erection Boat
Deadline— April 15, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC seeks solutions capable of autonomously performing functions currently undertaken by the Army’s Mk3 Bridge Erection Boat (BEB).
Read MoreAutonomous Solutions for Bridge Erection Boat
Submersible Matting System (SUBMAT)
Deadline— May 8, 2024 (Closed)
ERDCWERX seeks to identify business entities with the capacity to commercialize SUBMAT, a temporary "roadway" to support the offloading of military vehicles and supplies in austere coastal environments.
Read MoreSubmersible Matting System (SUBMAT)
Automated Cold Culturing
Deadline— March 8, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC seeks automated lab equipment for culturing microorganisms in cold regions, supporting Department of Defense directives to address biotechnology and enhance warfighting and logistics capability in the Arctic.
Read MoreAutomated Cold Culturing
Webinar: Material and Sensor Technologies
Deadline— February 26, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC's patented material and sensor technologies have strong market potential. During this webinar, attendees will learn how commercialization of these technologies can be beneficial for business growth and development.
Read MoreWebinar: Material and Sensor Technologies
Webinar: Water Technologies
Deadline— January 22, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC's patented water technologies have strong market potential. During this webinar, attendees will learn how commercialization of these technologies can be beneficial for business growth and development.
Read MoreWebinar: Water Technologies
Innovation 2 Market 2024
Deadline— April 1, 2024 (Closed)
The Innovation 2 Market Patent Showcase will be held on Tuesday, April 2, 2024, for businesses and investors to learn about featured technologies developed by the U.S. Army Engineer Research and Development Center (ERDC). ERDC seeks to identify business entities…
Read MoreInnovation 2 Market 2024
Decarbonized Bio-Infrastructure Materials
Deadline— January 19, 2024 (Closed)
ERDC seeks to identify engineered wood, mass timber, and related renewable materials that are commercially available and supported by industry knowledge and expertise.
Read MoreDecarbonized Bio-Infrastructure Materials
Sustaining Small Business Success with ERDC
Deadline— January 17, 2024 (Closed)
ERDCWERX is hosting a small business hybrid workshop for small businesses to learn how to pursue opportunities with ERDC.
Read MoreSustaining Small Business Success with ERDC
Additive Construction: Solutions in DOD Path to Adoption
Deadline— October 23, 2023 (Closed)
ERDC seeks knowledge and expertise of leading industry representatives in Additively Constructed Concrete (ACC) that have design/build experience and success in printing full-scale, occupiable structures.
Read MoreAdditive Construction: Solutions in DOD Path to Adoption
